RoweOS Back to RoweOS

Intelligence, accessible.

Simple plans. No hidden fees. Start building today.

All plans include a free trial with card required. Early adopters lock in pricing permanently.

Solo
Essentials
$29/mo

Everything you need to get started with AI-powered brand and life intelligence.

  • 1 Brand profile (Brand Intelligence)
  • 1 LifeAI profile (Life Intelligence)
  • Chat with all AI agents
  • Library and Memory
  • Pulse goal tracking
  • Rhythm scheduling
  • Basic Automations
  • Community support
Most Popular
Founder
Full Access
$59/mo

The complete RoweOS experience. Full platform access for brands and life.

  • Everything in Solo, plus:
  • Up to 5 Brand and LifeAI profiles
  • Studio operations and pipelines
  • Full automations and Agent chat
  • Mail and social publishing
  • Focus, Analytics and Identity
  • Cloud sync across devices
  • Priority support

$59/mo locked in permanently. Yours for life, as long as your subscription stays active.

Premium
Professional
$79/mo

For power users and teams who need advanced features and dedicated support.

  • Everything in Founder, plus:
  • Up to 15 Brand and LifeAI profiles
  • Bloom
  • Brand sharing and config export
  • Private onboarding session
  • 24/7 Priority support

How It Works

Sign up and start your free trial. When your trial ends, continue at your locked-in price.

1

Choose Your Plan

Select the tier that fits your needs. Every plan includes a free trial.

2

Set Up Your Workspace

Configure your brands, connect your AI providers, and start building with intelligence.

3

Lock In Your Price

Early adopters keep their rate forever. Your price never increases as long as you stay subscribed.

AI API Keys

Bring your own keys and pay only for what you use. Or purchase pre-loaded keys from The Rowe Collection.

Anthropic
Claude
  • Sonnet 4.6
  • Opus 4.7
  • Haiku 4.5
OpenAI
ChatGPT
  • GPT-5.4
  • GPT-5.4 Pro
  • GPT-5.4 Thinking
Google
Gemini
  • Gemini 3.1 Pro
  • Deep Research
  • NanoBanana 3 Pro

Pay as you go. Purchase pre-loaded API keys and they will be delivered to your RoweOS account automatically on next login.

RoweOS AI

When you have all three AI providers configured, RoweOS AI automatically selects the best model for each task. Strategy, research, creative, operations - each request is routed to the model that performs best for that specific operation.

RoweOS

Operating intelligence, built for brands and life.
